title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Code Llama, and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into any chain or agent with one line.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in Docker with no external API calls.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (text UI) for Ollama written in Go—browse, chat, and pull models inside your terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; Spring Boot starter included.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Official example repo showing how to build a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that registers Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-driven recipes: function-calling, voice chat, Docker Compose stacks, GPU tuning, etc.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package mirroring the ollama-js repo; 100 k weekly downloads.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package; 200 k monthly downloads, supports Python 3.8+.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container image (ghcr.io/ollama/ollama) with CUDA and CPU variants; updated on every release.

title: ollama-redis
summary: Redis plugin that adds vector-similarity search and semantic caching to Ollama chat endpoints.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models privately without leaving Slack.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit template for building shareable web apps powered by any Ollama model.

title: r/ollama – Local LLM Ecosystem Discussion
summary: Active subreddit (40 k members) for sharing models, benchmarks, and integrations around Ollama.
